title: Bridge Essay: Flow-Induced Analgesia: A Conceptual Review of Biopsychosocial and Neurobiologic

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Water/Pleasure** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Water and pleasure — flow state, peak experience, aesthetic pleasure, reward systems, pleasure neuroscience, hedonic tone, musical pleasure.

**Flow-Induced Analgesia: A Conceptual Review of Biopsychosocial and Neurobiological Mechanisms of Pain Modulation.** — J Pain Res. PMID: 41409397. DOI: 10.2147/JPR.S564395. Chronic pain remains one of the leading causes of disability worldwide and is strongly influenced by attentional and cognitive-emotional factors such as catastrophizing and hypervigilance. While distraction techniques (eg, virtual reality, music) and mindfulness-based approaches are established adjuncts in pain management, the psychological construct of flow-astate of deep absorption and effortless concentration described by Csikszentmihalyi-has not yet been systematically explored in pain medi...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 5 (Water/Pleasure). Evaluation: Excellent (score=12.2)
